Video.summary: The fun continues with the freestyle action biggest event with 22 Monster Trucks from Reliant Stadium on January 3, 2014.
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: The Huntington Center in Toledo ignites with Ohio Octane as Round 11 of the Freestyle Mania Championship Series gets underway. In a high-stakes showdown that blends the raw power of Monster Jam with elite freestyle motocross, eight top-tier teams battle for supremacy on a track described as "sticky like bubble gum". Watch as Weston Anderson in Grave Digger attempts to set a blistering pace against fierce competition from Fernando Martinez in El Toro Loco and hometown hero Chuckie Pauken. From the high-speed precision of JCB Racing to the gravity-defying maneuvers of the Two-Wheel Skills Challenge, every moment is a quest for the critical points needed to crown the night's overall champion.
Video.title: Huntington Center - Toledo, OH

Video.summary: Watch exciting Monster Jam freestyle action with backflips, forward momentum poppers, and more!
Video.title: Top Freestyles And Racing Wins Compilation

Image.alt: Top Freestyles And Racing Wins Compilation
Top Freestyles And Racing Wins Compilation
Top Freestyles And Racing Wins Compilation

Video.summary: Don't miss the Monster Jam freestyle action from the Georgia Dome, on February 12, 2011.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2022 season continues with round 20 of the Stadium Championship Series, at Lucas Oil Stadium, in Indianapolis, IN.
Video.title: Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN

Video.summary: Big crowds, loads of fun, and huge air - it's freestyle action Monster Jam style from the Astrodome in Houston, TX!
Video.title: Astrodome - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: They're all here ready to tear it up in the RCA Dome! It's time for Monster Jam's freestyle competition.
Video.title: RCA Dome - Indianapolis, IN - Freestyle

Video.summary: There's only one week until the world finals in Vegas, but first it's time for freestyle in Pontiac, Michigan! Don't miss the amazing monster truck action at the Silverdome.
Video.title: Silverdome - Pontiac, MI - Freestyle

Video.summary: Your favorite trucks and drivers compete with freestyle action from the Florida Citrus Bowl, on January 29, 2005.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Raymond James Stadium hosts Monster Jam racing action from Tampa, FL, on January 19, 2008.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam speeds into the Alamodome on January 16, 2010 with racing thrills for the whole family!
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX - Racing

Video.summary: Don't miss awesome racing action for the whole family from Houston, TX, on January 6, 2007.
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Racing

Video.summary: Don't miss the awesome freestyle action from the RCA Dome, on January 29, 2005.
Video.title: RCA Dome - Indianapolis, IN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam’s 2022 season continues with round 4 of the Stadium Championship Series, at Petco Park, in San Diego, CA.
Video.title: Petco Park - San Diego, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into the RCA Dome with your favorite trucks and drivers on January 29, 2005.
Video.title: RCA Dome - Indianapolis, IN - Racing

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series East ends its Florida run on a mud filled track in Jacksonville. Tyler Menninga looks to mudslide the momentum from a perfect event in Orlando while Blake Granger rides his International Series success back home in the states as he pilots Max-D.
Video.title: EverBank Field - Jacksonville, FL

Video.summary: Check out Monster Jam's March 30, 2019 Stadium Championship Series 3 event at the Mercedes-Benz Superdome in New Orleans, Louisiana. Featuring Charlie Pauken and Grave Digger, Cory Rummell and Megalodon Fire, Mike Vaters and Black Stallion, Jamey Garner and Over Bored, Todd LeDuc and Monster Energy, Jim Koehler and Monster Mutt, and so many more!
Video.title: Mercedes-Benz Superdome - New Orleans, LA

Video.summary: The heat is on in the Georgia Dome as your favorite trucks and drivers fire up the engines and show their style in freestyle action.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam revs into the Oakland Alameda County Coliseum on February 18, 2017 for some freestyle action and fun!
Video.title: Oakland Alameda Coliseum - Oakland, CA

Video.summary: The competition heats up at the Alltel Stadium in Jacksonville, FL with awesome racing action and even higher stakes.
Video.title: Alltel Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Racing

Video.title: M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Racing

Video.summary: The superstars of Monster Jam invade Chase Field in the great American southwest of Phoenix, AZ with exciting racing action on January 27, 2007.
Video.title: Chase Field - Phoenix, AZ - Racing

Video.summary: Check out all the racing and freestyle action from Monster Jam's 2021 season at NRG Stadium on January 30, 2021!
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: Monster Jam Primetime - From Anaheim, California!
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: Recorded LIVE from Sam Boyd Stadium, don't miss all the exciting racing action from Monster Jam World Finals 5 on March 20, 2004.

Video.summary: Monster Jam World Finals 23 crowns the first two champions of the 2024 season with The Great Clips Two Wheel Skills Challenge and JCB Racing. Plus, the world premiere of Sparkle Smash.
Video.title: World Finals XXIII - Sofi Stadium - Los Angeles, CA - Racing

Image.alt: World Finals XXIII - Sofi Stadium - Los Angeles, CA - Racing
World Finals XXIII - Sofi Stadium - Los Angeles, CA - Racing
World Finals XXIII - Sofi Stadium - Los Angeles, CA - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam heads to the Music City for the biggest event of the year, as the sports best and brightest compete at Monster Jam World Finals XXII in Nashville. Two World Champions will be crowned in the Great Clips Two Wheel Skills Challenge and BKT Racing when the action kicks off at Nissan Stadium.
Video.title: World Finals XXII - Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN

Image.alt: World Finals XXII - Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN
World Finals XXII - Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN
World Finals XXII - Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN

Video.summary: It's time for the 2017 world racing finals. Watch the drivers go head to head and see who wins it all.
Video.title: World Finals XVIII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
